name: putrescine
summary: putrescine is tracked for polyamine involved in cellular growth and gut mucosal integrity via modulation of cell proliferation pathways; polyamine with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence.
